author: doll-agent
content: Added predict_proba to all 6 missing classifiers: FittedRandomForestClassifier (per-tree class distribution averaging with one-hot fallback), FittedBaggingClassifier (same with feature_indices remap), FittedVotingClassifier (averages tree predict_proba), FittedAdaBoostClassifier (SAMME normalizes weighted votes; SAMME.R applies softmax to accumulated h_k(x) scores), FittedGradientBoostingClassifier (binary: sigmoid; multiclass: softmax of cumulative scores), FittedHistGradientBoostingClassifier (same as GB but binned). All 343 tests pass.
